name: gstack-codex
description: Codex-native adaptation of gstack: workflow skills plus a persistent Playwright browser for QA.

scripts.build: bun build --compile browse/src/cli.ts --outfile browse/dist/browse && bun build --compile browse/src/find-browse.ts --outfile browse/dist/find-browse && (git rev-parse HEAD > browse/dist/.version || echo dev > browse/dist/.version)
